page_title: Doujinshi Anthology Comic - FLY ME TO THE MOON
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by KOALA BOOKS on 10 December 1996. https://www.amazon.com/dp/4876933235/
